projects.title: Home Automation Project
projects.instruction:
1. Plan system:
   - Identify devices to control: lights, fans, doors
   - Design automation rules
   - Choose wireless technology (WiFi, Zigbee)
2. Pasang hardware:
   - Smart switches untuk lights
   - Smart plugs untuk appliances
   - Smart locks untuk doors
   - Central hub untuk coordination
3. Siapkan automation rules:
   - Time-based: lights on at sunset
   - Sensor-based: lights on when motion detected
   - Manual: smartphone app control
   - Conditional: if temperature > 30, turn on AC
4. Integration:
   - Hubungkan all devices ke hub
   - Verify communication
   - Tes automation sequences
5. Mobile app control
   - Pasang official app atau use generic control app
   - Siapkan rooms, devices
   - Buat automation scenarios
6. Monitoring dan optimization
projects.description: Membuat sistem automasi rumah yang intelligent dan convenient. Home automation membuat hidup lebih nyaman dan efisien energi.

projects.title: Industrial IoT Applications
projects.instruction:
1. Industrial sensors:
   - Temperature sensors: monitor machinery
   - Vibration sensors: detect anomalies
   - Pressure sensors: hydraulic systems
   - Flow sensors: fluid/gas monitoring
2. Data collection system:
   - Gateway untuk collect data dari berbagai sensors
   - Edge computing: local processing
   - Send summaries to cloud
3. Predictive maintenance:
   - Collect historical data
   - Analyze patterns
   - Predict failures before occur
   - Alert maintenance team
4. Energy monitoring:
   - Monitor power consumption
   - Identify inefficiencies
   - Optimize operations
5. Real-time dashboards
   - Live machine status
   - Alert system
   - Performance metrics
6. Security
   - Secure device authentication
   - Network segmentation
projects.description: Menerapkan IoT dalam industri untuk monitoring, optimization, dan predictive maintenance. Industrial IoT meningkatkan efisiensi dan mengurangi downtime.

projects.title: IoT Data Analytics
projects.instruction:
1. Data collection dan storage:
   - Time-series database untuk IoT data
   - InfluxDB, TimescaleDB, atau cloud solutions
   - Data retention policies
2. Data visualization:
   - Grafana untuk dashboards
   - Real-time charts, gauges, graphs
   - Historical trends
   - Alerts untuk anomalies
3. Analytics:
   - Python dengan pandas, numpy
   - Analyze sensor data patterns
   - Identify trends
   - Forecast future values
4. Machine learning (optional):
   - Anomaly detection
   - Predictive modeling
   - Classification algorithms
5. Reports generation
   - Automated reports
   - Executive summaries
   - Performance metrics
6. Data security
   - Access control
   - Data privacy
projects.description: Menganalisis data IoT untuk mendapatkan insights valuable. Data analytics mengubah raw data menjadi actionable intelligence.

projects.title: IoT Security
projects.instruction:
1. Device security:
   - Firmware updates: patch vulnerabilities
   - Strong passwords: avoid defaults
   - Physical security: secure device from tampering
   - Secure boot: prevent unauthorized firmware
2. Network security:
   - Encryption: TLS/SSL untuk data in transit
   - Firewall: filter unauthorized access
   - VPN: secure remote access
   - Network segmentation: isolate IoT devices
3. Authentication:
   - Certificates: device identity
   - API keys: application authentication
   - OAuth 2.0: secure access
4. Data protection:
   - Encryption at rest: stored data
   - Access control: who can access
   - Audit logs: track access
5. Threat monitoring:
   - IDS (Intrusion Detection System)
   - Anomaly detection
   - Response procedures
6. Compliance
   - GDPR, HIPAA (if applicable)
   - Standards: NIST, ISO 27001
projects.description: Mengamankan IoT system dari cyber threats dan vulnerability. Security adalah critical foundation untuk system yang trustworthy.

projects.title: Complete IoT System Design
projects.instruction:
1. Requirements analysis:
   - Define use case dan objectives
   - Identify constraints: power, bandwidth, cost
   - Specify performance requirements
2. System architecture:
   - Device layer: sensors, actuators
   - Gateway/edge layer: local processing
   - Network layer: communication protocol
   - Cloud layer: storage, analytics
   - Application layer: user interface
3. Technology selection:
   - Microcontroller: based on requirements
   - Wireless: WiFi, LoRa, NB-IoT
   - Cloud platform: AWS, Azure, Google
   - Database: time-series, relational
4. Prototype development
   - Bangun MVP (Minimum Viable Product)
   - Tes functionality
   - Get feedback
5. Scalability planning
   - Can system handle growth?
   - Load balancing
   - Database optimization
6. Documentation
   - System architecture diagrams
   - Component specifications
   - Integration guide
projects.description: Mendesain complete IoT system dari awal sampai implementasi. System design skills penting untuk project sukses.

projects.title: Accounting Fundamentals
projects.instruction:
1. Basic equation: Assets = Liabilities + Equity
   - Assets: apa yang dimiliki perusahaan
   - Liabilities: utang/kewajiban
   - Equity: modal pemilik
2. Double-entry bookkeeping:
   - Setiap transaksi affect dua akun
   - Debit + Credit harus balanced
   - Contoh: buy equipment dengan uang
     Debit Equipment, Credit Cash
3. Account types:
   - Asset accounts: cash, accounts receivable, inventory
   - Liability accounts: accounts payable, loans
   - Equity accounts: capital, retained earnings
   - Income accounts: sales, revenue
   - Expense accounts: salary, supplies, rent
4. Accounting cycle:
   - Record transactions
   - Post to ledger
   - Prepare trial balance
   - Adjust entries
   - Prepare financial statements
5. Latihan: journal entry untuk berbagai transaksi
projects.description: Memahami konsep dasar akuntansi yang fundamental untuk semua pekerjaan akuntansi. Pengetahuan ini adalah fondasi untuk career yang sukses.

projects.title: Accounting Software
projects.instruction:
1. Choose software: QuickBooks, Xero, FreshBooks, Zoho Books
2. Siapkan company:
   - Buat chart of accounts
   - Define fiscal year
   - Set up payment terms
3. Record transactions:
   - Invoice creation: track sales
   - Bill entry: track expenses
   - Payment recording: track cash flow
   - Bank reconciliation: verify transactions
4. Basic features:
   - Generate invoices
   - Track expenses
   - Buat purchase orders
   - Track inventory (if applicable)
5. Reports:
   - Income statement
   - Balance sheet
   - Cash flow statement
   - Trial balance
6. User accounts untuk multi-user access
7. Backup dan security
projects.description: Belajar menggunakan software akuntansi modern untuk efficiency dan accuracy. Software adalah tool essential untuk akuntan modern.

projects.title: Bookkeeping Processes
projects.instruction:
1. Daily bookkeeping tasks:
   - Record all transactions
   - Review untuk completeness dan accuracy
   - File receipts
   - Reconcile accounts
2. Invoice management:
   - Record invoice details
   - Track aging (overdue invoices)
   - Follow up untuk collection
   - Record payment
3. Bill payment:
   - Record bills dari vendors
   - Schedule payment
   - Record payment
   - Reconcile dengan vendor statements
4. Expense tracking:
   - Categorize expenses correctly
   - Ensure supporting documentation
   - Monitor budget vs actual
5. Bank reconciliation:
   - Monthly: compare book vs bank statement
   - Identify discrepancies
   - Adjust untuk timing differences
   - Verify cash position
6. Month-end closing:
   - Complete all transactions
   - Prepare trial balance
   - Review untuk accuracy
projects.description: Melakukan pekerjaan bookkeeping sehari-hari dengan accurate dan organized. Bookkeeping yang baik ensures semua transaksi tercatat dengan benar.

projects.title: Payroll Management
projects.instruction:
1. Payroll components:
   - Gross salary: total sebelum deductions
   - Deductions: tax, insurance, loans
   - Net pay: take-home setelah deductions
   - Employer contributions: pension, insurance
2. Tax calculations:
   - Income tax: based on salary, tax brackets
   - Social security: fixed percentage
   - Health insurance: employee portion
   - Other deductions: approved leave, advances
3. Payroll cycle:
   - Collect hours worked (timesheet)
   - Calculate salary
   - Deduct taxes dan other items
   - Generate payslip
   - Process payment
   - Record dalam accounting system
4. Payroll software
   - Siapkan employee details
   - Enter hours/attendance
   - System calculates automatically
   - Generate reports
5. Compliance
   - Maintain payroll records
   - File tax returns
   - Submit mandatory contributions
6. Audit trail
projects.description: Mengelola payroll karyawan dengan accurate dan compliant dengan regulasi. Payroll yang tepat waktu dan akurat penting untuk employee satisfaction.

projects.title: Tax Compliance
projects.instruction:
1. Types of taxes:
   - Income tax: individual atau corporate
   - Sales tax/VAT: pada purchases
   - Property tax: pada real estate
   - Employment tax: payroll related
2. Tax planning:
   - Pahami tax brackets
   - Identify deductible expenses
   - Plan untuk minimize tax liability legally
   - Track deductions throughout year
3. Tax documentation:
   - Keep all receipts: expenses, payments
   - Documentation untuk deductions
   - Bank statements
   - Invoices dan purchase orders
4. Tax filing:
   - Prepare tax return forms
   - Include all income
   - Claim deductions
   - Calculate taxes owed or refund
   - File before deadline
5. Records retention
   - Keep untuk minimum 7 years
   - Organized filing system
   - Digital backup
6. Compliance calendar
   - Imporant dates
   - Extension deadlines
   - Payment schedules
projects.description: Memastikan perusahaan compliant dengan semua tax requirements. Tax compliance yang baik mencegah penalties dan masalah legal.

projects.title: Financial Statements Preparation
projects.instruction:
1. Income Statement (P&L):
   - Revenue: total sales/income
   - Minus operating expenses
   - Equals operating profit
   - Minus interest, tax
   - Equals net income
   - Format: period (monthly/quarterly/annual)
2. Balance Sheet:
   - Assets = Liabilities + Equity
   - Current assets: cash, receivables
   - Fixed assets: equipment, property
   - Current liabilities: payables, short-term loans
   - Long-term liabilities
   - Date snapshot (not period)
3. Cash Flow Statement:
   - Operating cash flow: dari business operations
   - Investing cash flow: purchases/sales of assets
   - Financing cash flow: loans, equity
   - Net change dalam cash
4. Preparation process:
   - Gather trial balance
   - Make adjusting entries
   - Prepare statements
   - Review untuk accuracy
   - Footnotes explaining items
5. Analysis
   - Trends: compare previous periods
   - Ratios: profitability, liquidity
   - Red flags: declining performance
projects.description: Menyiapkan laporan keuangan yang menunjukkan kondisi finansial perusahaan. Report yang baik penting untuk stakeholders dan decision-making.

projects.title: Internal Audit
projects.instruction:
1. Audit purpose:
   - Verify accuracy dari financial records
   - Ensure compliance dengan policies
   - Identify weaknesses dalam controls
   - Provide recommendations
2. Audit procedures:
   - Review transactions (sample basis)
   - Verify supporting documentation
   - Reconcile accounts
   - Tes internal controls
3. Tesing approach:
   - Risk assessment: focus pada high-risk areas
   - Tes design effectiveness: do controls work?
   - Tes operating effectiveness: berfungsi consistently?
4. Audit findings:
   - Discrepancies: differences found
   - Control deficiencies: gaps dalam controls
   - Recommendations: how to improve
5. Documentation:
   - Audit program: procedures to perform
   - Workpapers: evidence of audit work
   - Audit memo: findings summary
6. Audit report
   - Findings
   - Recommendations
   - Management responsee
   - Follow-up actions
projects.description: Melakukan audit internal untuk ensure accuracy dan compliance. Audit yang baik mencegah fraud dan meningkatkan operational efficiency.

projects.title: Budget Planning & Variance Analysis
projects.instruction:
1. Budget preparation:
   - Historical data: previous year performance
   - Forecast assumptions: growth, inflation
   - Department budgets: input dari each area
   - Review dan approval
2. Budget types:
   - Operating budget: daily operations
   - Capital budget: long-term investments
   - Cash budget: cash flow projections
   - Project budget: specific projects
3. Budget components:
   - Revenue forecast
   - Operating expenses: salary, rent, supplies
   - Capital expenses
   - Contingency: reserve untuk unexpected
4. Variance analysis:
   - Actual vs budget comparison
   - Calculate differences (variance)
   - Percentage variance: actual/budget
   - Investigate large variances
   - Root cause analysis
5. Corrective actions:
   - When to intervene
   - Cost control measures
   - Revenue improvement
6. Reporting
   - Monthly variance reports
   - Trend analysis
   - Forecast revisions
projects.description: Merencanakan keuangan perusahaan dengan budget yang realistic dan monitoring variance. Budgeting yang baik helps dengan financial control dan planning.
projects.output: Annual budget dan variance analysis reports

projects.title: Financial Analysis & Ratios
projects.instruction:
1. Key financial ratios:
   - Profitability: Net income / Revenue = profit margin
   - Liquidity: Current assets / Current liabilities
   - Efficiency: Revenue / Total assets = asset turnover
   - Leverage: Total debt / Total equity
2. Trend analysis:
   - Compare over time: 3-5 years
   - Identify patterns
   - Spot problems early
3. Comparative analysis:
   - Industry benchmarks
   - Competitor comparison
   - Best practices
4. Cash flow analysis:
   - Operating cash flow: sustainable?
   - Free cash flow: after capital expenses
   - Cash flow to earnings: quality of earnings
5. Performance indicators:
   - ROI (Return on Investment)
   - ROE (Return on Equity)
   - DuPont analysis: break down ROE
6. Forecasting
   - Project future performance
   - Sensitivity analysis: what-if scenarios
   - Scenario planning: best/worst case
projects.description: Menganalisis laporan keuangan untuk understand kondisi bisnis dan identify opportunities. Financial analysis helps dengan strategic decision-making.

projects.title: Business Accounting Management
projects.instruction:
1. Small business accounting:
   - Single-entry atau double-entry bookkeeping
   - Managing receivables/payables
   - Inventory tracking
   - Tax planning
2. Chart of accounts design:
   - Logical organization
   - Easy to understand
   - Facilitates reporting
   - Flexibility untuk growth
3. Month-end procedures:
   - Complete all transactions
   - Adjusting entries (accruals, prepaid)
   - Trial balance
   - Financial statements
   - Reconciliations
4. Controls and procedures:
   - Check approvals
   - Segregation of duties
   - Documentation requirements
   - Review procedures
5. Communication:
   - Present financial results ke management
   - Explain variances
   - Provide insights
   - Recommendations
6. System maintenance
   - Updates
   - Compliance
   - Training
projects.description: Mengelola akuntansi untuk bisnis dengan organized dan professional. Good accounting management provides financial clarity dan supports growth.
